prompt: Create a straight-on 16:9 industrial inspection photograph of a dark graphite composite machinery access panel with exactly three separated defects: an amber corrosion bloom near the upper right, a pale hairline crack near the center, and a damaged or missing circular fastener near the lower left. No people, tools, reticles, UI, labels, logos, watermark, circles, or arrows.
functionalUse: The committed pixels define the three defect targets, their normalized coordinates, and browser-sampled evidence used by the reticle snapping task.
